---
title: "Project"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

::::::: grid
:::: g-col-4
::: card
### Report of Health Data Science 

**Project:** Mid-term project\
**Location:** University of Michigan

`#RNAseqAnalysis` `#MitochondrialDisease` `#DataScience` `#R` `#Visualization`

RNAseq Analysis from GSE292178.

[Report](MidTermProject_So_Final_Rev.html) \| Mar. 2026
:::
::::

:::: g-col-4
::: card
### Research Paper of AI Drug Discovery 

**Journal:** CSBJ\
**Authors:** So et al. 

`#AIDrugDiscovery` `#KnowledgeGraph` `#ParkinsonDisease` `#DataScience` `#ResearchPaper` `#AI `

AI Application of Biomedical Knowledge-Graph DB\
I am the first and corresponding Author.

[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.csbj.2025.12.035) \|
Jan. 2026
:::
::::
:::::::
